note: Builds on the v172 hotfix in website/js/security.js (byte-accurate capsule counter overlay, web Document Reference file picker with browser-side SHA-256, public capsule sendmany on Open Note / Structured Data / Certification / Document Reference attaching the same payload to every payment output and never to change, plus 16,000-byte standard tx preflight). Adds two complementary fixes that live in the static HTML so they survive even if security.js fails to load: (1) the capsule textarea now wires its counter inline via oninput / onpaste attributes — backstop for the v171 DOMContentLoaded listener that could leave the count stuck at '0 / 80'. (2) Latest Transactions table headers IN / OUT now carry 'UTXOs' / 'outputs' subtitles and AMOUNT carries 'payment', so a row reading IN=115 OUT=2 AMOUNT=450 cannot be misread as '115 SOST in, 2 SOST out, 450 transferred'. Sealed/encrypted Capsule modes remain PLANNED. NO consensus, NO RPC schema, NO transaction wire format. Force-reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
